notes: Goldilocks324 (offlane) was alive but losing lane and pinned — with them stuck across the map, this was the wrong fight to start.
Willy Guggenheim (carry) was alive and ahead in lane — a shove-and-rotate there flips a 0-3 into a numbers advantage.
We took Fangtooth in the same window — read it as a trade, not a clean loss.

🎮 private (support) was alive and ahead in lane — a shove-and-rotate there flips a 0-2 into a numbers advantage.

draftNote: 1 of five queued off a bottom-two lane: Mr_Meat31 (midlane→offlane).

threats: Chain-CC risk (3 hard-CC abilities, ~1.5s of lockdown): Mourn Abduct (pull), Iggy & Scorch Inferno (knockback), Lt. Belica Neural Disruptor (silence 0.5s). Don't group tight into it — stagger the engage and hold mobility/cleanse for the key one.
Heal-stacking: Mourn. Anti-heal is mandatory against this comp — we brought none.
synergy: Our engage/CC: Grux Crush (knockup 0.5s). Our kills come from landing burst INSIDE that CC window — whoever lands it, the rest must follow up immediately.
Strong AoE/teamfight kit — group at choke points and fight on top of objectives.

ourKits.combo: Bramble Patch slow → Harvest Nettles stacks → Untamed Growth DoT → Fly Trap pull ult
ourKits.winCondition: Fly Trap a clumped team and detonate AoE on the pull
ourKits.passive: takedowns spawn growths + grant move speed
ourKits.playWith: engage that clumps for her Fly Trap
ourKits.playAgainst: spread out vs the pull; she's squishy — dive her

ourKits.combo: Smash 'n Grab pull → Crush knockup → Warlord's Challenge stun → bleed-stacked basics
ourKits.winCondition: land the pull→knockup chain to lock a target while bleed and AS shred them
ourKits.passive: basics stack a bleed for sustained damage
ourKits.playWith: follow-up burst inside his knockup/stun window
ourKits.playAgainst: telegraphed engage — bait Crush/Pull, then punish; kite his slow start

ourKits.combo: Stasis Bomb stun → Photon Disruptor slow → Containment Fence wall → Ion Strike slow ult
ourKits.winCondition: lock a target with stun + fence and let the team collapse
ourKits.passive: Rocket Boots mobility, refreshed by abilities
ourKits.playWith: burst that converts her stun/fence into a kill
ourKits.playAgainst: dodge Stasis Bomb; the fence zones — flank around it

ourKits.combo: Old Rusty slow → Gag Grenade silence → Rad Rounds basics → Shrapnel Cannon armor shred
ourKits.winCondition: kite back, stack Wastelander bleed and Rad Rounds, melt from range
ourKits.playWith: peel and frontline so he can free-fire
ourKits.playAgainst: low mobility — dive him or break LoS through his poke; he folds to hard engage

ourKits.combo: Ascend dive → Heaven's Fury multi-strike → Chastise slow → Heresy form ult, resets on takedowns
ourKits.winCondition: dive the backline and snowball Heresy resets
ourKits.playWith: a frontline that creates her dive angle
ourKits.playAgainst: peel the backline — deny the first kill and her resets dry up

enemyKits.combo: Scar mark → Obliterate homing missiles → Reckoning 1v1 realm ult
enemyKits.winCondition: Reckoning a target into the Nether Realm and crit them down 1v1
enemyKits.playWith: a team to clean up if his 1v1 stalls
enemyKits.playAgainst: the ult is a 1v1 — peel the realmed ally can't help, so don't be caught alone; he's crit-reliant early-weak

enemyKits.combo: Abduct pull → Contagion ally-heal bugs → Beguile damage-reduction → Eclipse vision-denial ult
enemyKits.winCondition: pull a target in and sustain the team through the brawl
enemyKits.playWith: burst that punishes his pulled target
enemyKits.playAgainst: respect the long Abduct channel/range; anti-heal blunts Contagion

enemyKits.combo: Oil Spill → Molotov ignite → Flame Turret → Inferno knockback ult
enemyKits.winCondition: layer fire zones on a choke/objective and burn the team
enemyKits.playWith: CC that holds enemies in his fire
enemyKits.playAgainst: don't fight in his zones — flank; kill the turret, dive him

enemyKits.combo: Seismic Assault knockup → Void Bomb → Neural Disruptor silence ult, Void Drone mana drain
enemyKits.winCondition: knock up + silence a target and burst with missing-HP scaling
enemyKits.playAgainst: dodge Seismic Assault; she's immobile — dive when ult is down

enemyKits.combo: Lash Kick gap-close+slow → Windburn %hp basics → Backlash push, Quelling Gale to disengage
enemyKits.passive: Rising Storm stacks grant attack speed
enemyKits.playWith: a team that lets her side-lane and pick
enemyKits.playAgainst: she wants 1v1s — group and burst her; Quelling Gale only stops projectiles

itemTimelineNote: estMin = first minute the role's measured median gold curve covers the cumulative inventory cost (slot order ≈ purchase order) — THEORY, no purchase timestamps in either API

fights.note: caught-out = deaths outside every clustered fight; costs/conversion use a 90s window over the per-event objective+tower stream; itemGap counts participants' items est. online (median-gold model, THEORY)
